caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a dark green hoodie with "BOSSES TALK" printed in gold, and over-ear headphones sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is smiling and looking toward someone off-screen. In front of him is a professional microphone on a black boom arm and a black mug with the text "TALK OUT" visible. Behind him, a white banner features the phrase "UNICA HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside rows of yellow stars. A screen in the background displays the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". The scene remains static across the frames, with only subtle shifts in the man's facial expression and posture as he continues to smile and engage in a conversation. To his left, a small black monitor displays a logo that includes the words "BOSSES TALK".
